Class GameResult

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.Game.Persistence.GameResult
public final class GameResult extends Object
Immutable representation of a finished match result.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    GameResult(String matchId, Instant endedAt, String finalReport, List<PlayerScore> playerScores)
    Constructs a new GameResult holding the final scores and reports of a match.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Instant
    endedAt()
    Returns the timestamp when the match ended.
    String
    finalReport()
    Returns the final textual report of the match.
    String
    matchId()
    Returns the unique match identifier.
    List<PlayerScore>
    playerScores()
    Returns the list of final player scores.

  • Constructor Details

    • GameResult

      public GameResult(String matchId, Instant endedAt, String finalReport, List<PlayerScore> playerScores)
      Constructs a new GameResult holding the final scores and reports of a match.
      Parameters:
      matchId - The unique identifier of the match.
      endedAt - The timestamp when the match finished.
      finalReport - A text report summarizing the match events.
      playerScores - The list of player scores.

  • Method Details

    • matchId

      public String matchId()
      Returns the unique match identifier.
      Returns:
      The match ID.

    • endedAt

      public Instant endedAt()
      Returns the timestamp when the match ended.
      Returns:
      The end timestamp.

    • finalReport

      public String finalReport()
      Returns the final textual report of the match.
      Returns:
      The final report.

    • playerScores

      public List<PlayerScore> playerScores()
      Returns the list of final player scores.
      Returns:
      The list of player scores.
